name: Biscotti (Italian Sheet Cookies)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Shortening melted (half butter and half oil)
4 teaspoons Extract (anise, almond, vanilla, or lemon)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs well.
2. Add sugar to the egg mixture.
3. Mix in the shortening and extract.
4. Gradually add flour and baking powder to the mixture.
5. Pour the batter into an ungreased 9x13 inch pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 to 20 minutes.
7. When done, slice the baked dough into three rows.
8. Cut each row into individual slices.
9. Place the slices on a cookie sheet and brown under the broiler.
